content.speakerText: I should head to the next session—great chatting with you!
content.speakerTextCn: 我该去下一个环节了，跟你聊得很开心！
expectedAnswers: Same here! Let's keep in touch.
Thanks so much! I really enjoyed our talk—hope you have an amazing day!
You too! Catch you at the coffee break!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然回应了道别并表达积极情绪
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者的日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'keep in touch', 'enjoyed', 'catch you' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I've really enjoyed our conversation—I need to head out now.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很享受我们的对话，我得走了。
expectedAnswers: Me too! Thanks for the great chat—have a wonderful day!
Same here! Hope your afternoon goes smoothly.
It was a pleasure talking with you. See you soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应了对方的感谢并表达祝福
语言准确性：是否避免了生硬或语法错误的表达
表达自然度：是否使用了符合语境的口语化表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'enjoyed', 'thanks', 'have a wonderful day', 'see you' 等核心短语

content.speakerText: I've got to run, but it was so nice meeting you!
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，但很高兴认识你！
expectedAnswers: Thanks! Hope we cross paths again soon.
Same here! Wishing you all the best!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了‘很高兴认识你’并维持友好氛围
语言准确性：是否正确使用了连接词和时态
表达自然度：是否避免了机械重复或过于正式的措辞
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'likewise', 'connect', 'cross paths', 'all the best' 等地道表达
